spec.description:
Application Performance Index (0–1).

satisfied  = requests < 0.5 s
tolerating = requests 0.5–2.5 s (count as 0.5)
frustrated = requests > 2.5 s (ignored)

Apdex = (satisfied + tolerating/2) / total

≥ 0.94 excellent · ≥ 0.7 acceptable · < 0.7 poor
spec.title: Apdex

spec.description: Requests per second aggregated across all endpoints (R — Rate in RED methodology).
spec.title: RPS — total

spec.description: RPS by HTTP status code. 2xx green · 3xx blue · 4xx yellow · 5xx red.
spec.title: RPS — by status code

spec.description: Median latency across all endpoints. Represents the typical user experience.
spec.title: P50 — total

spec.description: 95th percentile latency across all endpoints. A good SLA target between P50 and P99.
spec.title: P95 — total

spec.description:
Tail latency across all endpoints.

P99 spike with stable P50 → GC pause, lock contention, or slow DB query.

Yellow > 1 s · Red > 5 s
spec.title: P99 — total

spec.description: Median latency per endpoint. Compare with total to spot outliers.
spec.title: P50 — by path

spec.description:
Fraction of 4xx and 5xx responses out of total requests.

Yellow > 1% · Red > 5%
spec.title: Error Rate

spec.description: RPS per endpoint. Shows which paths carry the most traffic.
spec.title: RPS — by path

spec.description: 95th percentile latency per endpoint. Lines spiking above the rest are optimization candidates.
spec.title: P95 — by path

spec.description: Tail latency per endpoint. Yellow > 1 s · Red > 5 s
spec.title: P99 — by path

spec.description: Instant snapshot of the 10 slowest endpoints by P95 latency. Bars are colour-graded green → red.
spec.title: Top 10 Slowest Endpoints — P95

spec.expr: sort_desc(sum by(handler, method)(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{project=~"$project", method=~"$method", handler!~"/metrics|/openapi.json|/docs|/health"}[$__range])) / sum by(handler, method)(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{project=~"$project", method=~"$method", handler!~"/metrics|/openapi.json|/docs|/health"}[$__range]) > 0))

spec.description: Mean response time per endpoint, sorted descending. Compare with P95 to spot endpoints with high variance.
spec.title: Avg Duration by Endpoint

spec.description:
Rate of client errors (4xx) per endpoint.

400 bad request · 401/403 auth · 404 not found · 422 validation error

High 422s on a POST endpoint → schema mismatch on the client side.
spec.title: 4xx Rate by Path

spec.description:
Rate of server errors (5xx) per endpoint.

Any non-zero value warrants investigation. Correlate with 'Exceptions by Type' and 'Log Stream'.
spec.title: 5xx Rate by Path

spec.description: Service dependency graph from Tempo. Nodes are services, edges are calls. Thickness indicates call volume.
spec.title: Service Map

spec.description: Latest distributed traces for the selected service. Click a trace ID to open the full trace in Tempo.
spec.title: Recent Traces

spec.expr: sum by(span_name)(rate(traces_spanmetrics_calls_total{service="$service" , span_name!~"GET /health| GET /health http send| GET /metrics| GET /metrics http send"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description:
RPS per span/operation derived from distributed traces (Tempo span metrics).

Covers internal calls not visible in HTTP metrics.
spec.title: Span RPS by Operation

spec.description:
P99 latency per span/operation from trace span metrics.

More granular than HTTP metrics — includes DB calls, cache lookups, internal functions.
spec.title: Span P99 Latency by Operation

spec.description:
Fraction of spans with STATUS_CODE_ERROR per operation.

High error rate on an internal span with no HTTP 5xx → swallowed exception.
spec.title: Span Error Rate by Operation

spec.description:
Rate of database calls from the service graph (Tempo).

Spikes here during high HTTP load are expected; spikes without HTTP load → background job.
spec.title: DB Call RPS

spec.description:
P99 latency of database calls via service graph metrics.

Correlate with application P99 — if DB P99 grows with app P99, the database is the bottleneck.
spec.title: DB P99 Latency

spec.description:
Rate of failed database calls from the service graph.

Any non-zero value warrants investigation. Correlate with 5xx rate and exception types.
spec.title: DB Failed Requests

spec.description:
Total number of requests in the selected time range ($__range).

Updates automatically when you adjust the Grafana time window.
spec.title: Total Requests

spec.description: Number of active Gunicorn workers. Drop below expected count → worker crash.
spec.title: Workers
